statement: Find two numbers that sum to target, but the array is sorted.
Find the longest increasing subsequence, but only consider even numbers.
Given an array of integers, find the element that appears most frequently.
Given a string, return the character that appears least often.
Given an array and target, return indices of the two numbers that add up to target.
Given a string containing just brackets, determine if it is valid.
Find the subarray with sum closest to zero.
Find the two numbers with the smallest difference in the array.
A warehouse has daily profit/loss records. Find the period with highest total gain.
Given transaction amounts, find the contiguous block with maximum total value.
